hero.title: See the signal before others —
hero.description: Daily intelligence on Western media and global think tanks with expert interpretation. Not an automated news roundup, but a decision-ready brief: what happened, what it means, and what it affects.
hero.trustedBy: MFA-level experience · monitoring for government and NGO bodies · 70+ global think tanks

features.title: What you get
features.subtitle: A decision-ready product, not a content stream

signal.title: Daily signal scale
signal.description: Every topic rated by impact (negative / neutral / positive) with a clear 'what this means'.

expert.title: Expert interpretation
expert.description: Analysis is produced by specialists with state-monitoring experience, not a faceless model.

sources.title: 20+ media & 70+ think tanks
sources.description: CNN, BBC, Reuters, FT, Economist, Chatham House, RAND, Carnegie, Brookings — in one brief.

ukrainian.title: In Ukrainian, focused on you
ukrainian.description: Full summaries in Ukrainian, focused on the consequences for Ukraine and your field.

delivery.title: Before the workday starts
delivery.description: A ready document by email every morning — open, read, decide.

custom.title: Tuned to your topics
custom.description: On Pro and above — custom filters, regions, and actors for your specific brief.

collect.title: Sample
collect.description: You receive a fresh brief tailored to your field — and see the quality on a real example.

analyze.title: Pilot
analyze.description: A week or two in test mode: topics are tuned to your real decisions.

deliver.title: Subscription
deliver.description: Move to a regular format on the plan that fits your team.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Subscriptions for organizations. Always starts with a free sample and pilot — no commitment.
pricing.note: Need a one-off report or event-based monitoring? A project format is available — write us for a quote.

daily.name: Daily Brief
daily.description: Daily Western-press intelligence for one team.

pro.name: Pro Intelligence
pro.description: Press + think tanks + direct analyst contact.

custom.name: Custom Intelligence
custom.description: Intelligence tailored to your organization's brief.

trialModal.title: Request a sample brief

sample.title: What it looks like
sample.subtitle: A fragment of the signal scale from a real issue. The full version is 16 pages of analysis.
signals: [NEGATIVE] MISSILE TERROR — Russia launched one of the largest strikes of 2026: 703 targets, 18+ killed
[NEGATIVE] ENERGY CRISIS — IEA: Europe has 6 weeks of jet fuel. Brent: $98. ECB warns of stagflation
[NEUTRAL] NATO WITHOUT US — 'Plan B' gains momentum with Germany's support. Italy breaks defense deal with Israel
[POSITIVE] DRONE DIPLOMACY — Netherlands: €248M. Petraeus: Ukraine surpasses US in warfare concept
sample.fullVersion: Download the full brief (16 pages, PDF)
sample.tryNote: We'll send a fresh issue tailored to your field

cta.title: Get a fresh brief for your field — free
cta.description: Leave a request — we'll get back with a sample and a short plan for adapting the intelligence to your decisions.

footer.description: Strategic Western media intelligence for Ukrainian decision-makers.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Analytics, insights, and news from the InsightRadar team

about.title: About InsightRadar
about.subtitle: We build tools for understanding the global media landscape

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make Western media analytics accessible to every Ukrainian decision-maker. We believe that understanding the external media environment is key to strategic planning.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: InsightRadar was created in 2025 in response to the need of Ukrainian analysts, diplomats, and business leaders for systematic Western media monitoring. The product is part of the NextMosaic ecosystem.

values.title: Our Values
values.accuracyDesc: We work only with verified sources and ensure analytics quality
values.speedDesc: PDF digest every morning by 08:00 — you start the day with the full picture
values.focusDesc: All analytics are filtered through the lens of Ukraine's interests
